heroTitle: Help future patients feel more confident.
heroDescription: Your honest feedback helps Esthetic Match patients better understand the quality of care, communication, and experience they can expect.

security.private: This invitation is private and linked to your patient account.
security.oneTime: The link can be used once and cannot be transferred to another account.

successTitle: Thank you for sharing your experience
successDescription: Your review has been submitted securely and is now connected to the correct doctor profile.
ratingLabel: How would you rate your overall experience?
chooseRating: Choose a rating from 1 to 5 stars.
reviewPlaceholder: Share clear, respectful details about your consultation, treatment, communication, and overall experience...
validationError: Add a title, write at least 10 characters, and choose a rating.
submissionError: Your review could not be submitted. Please try again.
submissionNotice: By submitting, you confirm that this review reflects your genuine experience with this doctor.

errors.unauthorizedDescription: Sign in to Esthetic Match using the exact email address that received this invitation, then reopen this private link.
errors.wrongAccountTitle: This invitation belongs to another account
errors.wrongAccountDescription: You are signed in with a different account. Use the patient account connected to the email address that received this invitation.
errors.expiredDescription: For security, private review links are available for a limited time. Ask the doctor to send you a new invitation.
errors.revokedTitle: This invitation is no longer active
errors.revokedDescription: The doctor has replaced or cancelled this link. Ask for a new private review invitation.
errors.usedTitle: Your review has already been submitted
errors.usedDescription: This private link can only be used once and is no longer available.
errors.notFoundDescription: The link may be incomplete or invalid. Open the full link from the invitation email.
errors.genericTitle: We could not open this invitation
errors.genericDescription: A temporary issue prevented us from validating the link. Please try again.
